name: Galaxy Pass Station
short_description: Build a space station for 15 alien races! 👽 Inspect IDs, catch criminals, and manage a chaotic galactic hub. A vibrant mix of colony sim & document-checking action. Can you build the ultimate hotel?
detailed_description:
👽 INSPECT ALIENS, BUILD AN EMPIRE 🏨

You are the first line of defense and the ultimate host! In this vibrant pixel-art manager, your job is to turn a rundown station into the galaxy's #1 hub. Carefully inspect documents of 15 unique alien species, deny entry to suspicious characters, and stamp passports like a pro.

Use your hard-earned resources to expand. Build capsule hotels, cinemas, and karaoke bars. Transform your station from a checkpoint into a bustling resort where every visitor leaves happy (and empty-pocketed)!

⚖️ FIND YOUR MANAGEMENT STYLE

Love the thrill of inspection? Handle every passport yourself for maximum profit.

Prefer being an architect? Hire staff to automate check-ins. You can then focus on building the perfect station, managing production chains, and handling the daily chaos of a galactic hub.

💥 SURVIVE THE CHAOS

Life in space is unpredictable. Be ready for anything, from a beetle parasite outbreak to mysterious traders and runaway inflation. Watch out for criminals like pyromaniacs and thieves trying to slip past your security!

🚀 YOUR STATION, YOUR RULES

Will you be a strict gatekeeper or a benevolent host? Follow the branching story campaign with multiple endings or build freely in Endless Mode. Run the galaxy’s most interesting transit point your way!

supported_languages: English, Russian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, French, Japanese
